Legal

Disclaimer

Effective date: 07 May 2026

This Disclaimer applies to the website and services offered by VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED (“Vorynex”, “we”, “us”). By accessing or using our website or Services, you agree to this Disclaimer along with our other published policies.

1) Informational purposes

Content on this website is provided for general information about our company and Services. While we take reasonable care to keep information accurate and up to date, we do not warrant completeness, accuracy, or suitability for any particular purpose.

2) No professional advice

Information on this website does not constitute legal, financial, tax, or professional advice. You should obtain independent advice appropriate to your circumstances before making decisions.

3) Service availability

Services may be modified, updated, suspended, or discontinued (in whole or part) for maintenance, security, compliance, or business reasons. Availability may vary by geography, device, and network conditions.

4) Third-party links and providers

Our website or Services may reference or link to third-party websites, tools, or payment/infrastructure providers. Such third parties are not under our control and we are not responsible for their content, policies, or practices. Your use of third-party services is at your own risk and subject to their terms.

5) Compliance statement

Vorynex is a technology company providing SaaS-based digital solutions and online software services. We publish policies intended to support operational transparency and compliance review. This does not constitute a representation that the Services are suitable for any specific regulatory classification; suitability depends on the customer’s specific use case and applicable laws.

6) Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Vorynex shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, revenues, data, goodwill, or business interruption, arising from or related to the website or Services, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.

7) Trademark notice

Any third-party names or trademarks referenced (if any) are the property of their respective owners and are used for identification only, without implying affiliation or endorsement.

8) Contact

Questions about this Disclaimer: contact@vorynex.in

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED

Enterprise-grade SaaS and online software services from India.
